feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I was so confused why I was suffering from this cold/detached/depressed feeling …
entry.content: I was so confused why I was suffering from this cold/detached/depressed feeling and I realized today that it was because I had given up on normal life. Now I promised myself I will do something and that I can't keep living like this and I feel good again. The only thing I need is a wife, how hard could finding a loving wife would be? There are billions of women out there just waiting for me.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: What exactly is the point of pre-ordering a digital game that will never run out…
entry.content: What exactly is the point of pre-ordering a digital game that will never run out anyway? >muh pre order bonus cosmetics You could literally buy it the day before it comes out and still get that if its that important to you. You don't need to worry about it 5 months in advance and your just telling devs you'll buy whatever slop they shit out.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Here's what those of us who once kind of liked the Guess Who always hoped they'd…
entry.content: Here's what those of us who once kind of liked the Guess Who always hoped they'd become, and if that sounds dumb to the rest of you, you're missing something. This may be crude as a ploughboy, but Randy Bachman has always had a way with the catchy riff, and Turner, I suppose, provides the overdrive. B+

entry.title: /b/ Random: I love gooning way too much and I don't want to stop
entry.content: This is not really a cry for help but rather a rant. I've been addicted to pornography since I was 9 years old after being groomed by my male neighbors. It has been 14 years, and the problem is only getting worse. It is no longer just jerking off to porn. It has become gooning, and if you know what that actually means, it is terrifying. Gooning is so fun because I am fetishizing my own addiction. I made a porn account with nothing but porn on the feed. I talk to other gooners, send each other ma

entry.title: /g/ Technology: New VMAF version
entry.content: VMAF is a video quality metric developed by Netflix, recently they released a new version ("v1"): https://medium.com/netflix-techblog /vmaf-v1-good-is-not-good-enough-60 d7e4244ea8 https://github.com/Netflix/vmaf/blo b/master/resource/doc/models_v1.md TL;DR: >banding metric CAMBI included >chroma channels included >no-enhancement gain (NEG) mode default >improved motion feature and dedicated models for high-frame-rate content (50/60 fps) Ran a quick test. Source is Netflix_DinnerScene from Xiph,

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /scaly/ - Scaly General #1662
entry.content: Post lewd reptiles and discuss scaly stuff, male or female is fine. Dragons, wyverns, dinosaurs, lizards, snakes, and reptile-folk such as kobolds and Argonians are welcome, on top of other things with scales like sharks as well. Anthros, ferals and human/scaly are allowed, but please, no monstergirls. As some may take a few creative liberties on their creations, do inquire if there's a particular edge case you're unsure about. ============== >Lurking or just reading the FAQ before posting is en

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Static Linux
entry.content: Greetings, im making a source-based linux distro that follows thouroughly the UNIX philosophy >it uses its own custom init system wrote in RUST called prometheus >it uses its own package manager wrote in C called ace (or ace compiles everything) >there are many other utils but i forgot >it also uses musl busybox >and near no-gnu is in the base system Soo yeah.. maybe contribute, try it, whatever.. https://staticlinux.org https://discord.gg/R6yKkYaEWX https://codeberg.org/staticlinux

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Nintendo is /v/ Disney
entry.content: It's kinda creepy how eerily similar Shiggy and Nintendo are to Disney even to the point where in later stage of shiggy's career he is leading the creation of them parks. People in the past have made connections to Disney when discussing Nintendo but I truly feel now with the success of the Switch era and the Hollywood movies, Nintendo now has officially become the Disney of video games. You can pint post April 5th 2023 with the launch of the animated Mario movie as the hard date for this shift.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Dark World / DJ Lucas
entry.content: so does anyone actually know what the allegations were against DJ Lucas? It's clear that Dark World kind of disbanded and everyone went in their own directions, and there's bits and pieces in comments sections across the internet saying that Lucas has some SA allegations but he got them wiped from the internet somehow. What actually happened? It's a shame because following Dark World was super fun, lots of creativity coming out of those guys but it seems like it's all fallen apart since this shi

entry.content: >Dude! Dude! You just had to be there for the action-packed high testosterone extravaganza of consumerist, soulless goyslop! It was so good bro! Cinema peaked in the 60s and went quickly downhill in the 70s, then you end up with the garish waste that is 80s action and horror movies.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Soulslike clones are an over-saturated market, with few that come to understand …
entry.content: Soulslike clones are an over-saturated market, with few that come to understand the core concepts that makes it great. this is especially so with large companies who wish to create something similar without the soul or essence, It comes evidently clear the ignorance in companies when someone who read too much Alice can come up with a more honest souls-like than so called "professionals" and their limitless budget. When will companies understand what makes the souls series great?

It could be for "wrong" reasons like "I like watching top scene", or "because i am used to it". But be honest. Thank you.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: At some point GPUs will become so valuable, the government will have no choice b…
entry.content: At some point GPUs will become so valuable, the government will have no choice but to declare eminent domain on the population's GPUs. They will offer fair-market prices for your GPUs, but if you don't agree to sell they WILL take them from you. Control of GPUs will become an existential matter for countries.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: >paying twice as much for a 'reliable' car with over 100k or just buying a cheap…
entry.content: >paying twice as much for a 'reliable' car with over 100k or just buying a cheap low mileage domestic

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Pickup is a body style, truck is a construction type. A Ford F-150 is a pickup t…
entry.content: Pickup is a body style, truck is a construction type. A Ford F-150 is a pickup truck, a Maverick is a pickup, an Expedition is a truck. Also if it's not a truck it's not an SUV but instead a crossover, like the current Explorer. Not open to having my mind changed but don't let that stop you.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: This shit ruined software developers. I remember when I used to fetch a manual f…
entry.content: This shit ruined software developers. I remember when I used to fetch a manual for the language or library I used and actually RTFM unlike now, people just google search their way to sub optimal results I refuse to use anything that was built by these onions devs they're not even coding anymore, searching for an answer isn't sustainable, we're wasting thousands of petabytes of storage just so people can search for answers they should be looking up in books or have notes

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Anyone else love a lot of Hardcore music but hate the Hardcore scene
entry.content: I'm a metalhead, but I really love a lot of Hardcore. The scene has been thriving post covid, and a lot of great music has been coming out, lots of new bands have been getting there flowers in a bit way. That being said the hardcore community and culture is fucking shit. It's the WORST mix of douchebag tough-guys, and left-wing söyboi, lots of hicklibs, and weird larping zoomers who are really just there because. To make things even worse, the metal scene is basically the same now, go to any lar

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Why do they drip-feed us long-requested biomes once a year instead of just addin…
entry.content: Why do they drip-feed us long-requested biomes once a year instead of just adding multiple in one update? We're still missing dozens of biomes that should've been added years ago, like cypress wetlands, mediterranean plains (with Iberian/Italian-style villages), palm trees, redwoods, etc.
